sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39258" key="e)pidio/gkwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδιόγκωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n39258.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swelling up</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.48</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
